artifacts.name: Toolbar.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Unit and behavioral tests for FR-TOOL-001 Place Mode Tool — T-FE-TOOL-001-01 and T-FE-TOOL-001-02

summary.work_completed: Authored complete frontend test suite for FR-TOOL-001 (Place Mode Tool). Two test IDs implemented: T-FE-TOOL-001-01 (unit — store.activeTool defaults to 'place') and T-FE-TOOL-001-02 (behavioral — full App render, aria-pressed, CSS class, tool switching). Tests define the TDD contract for the coding agent.
key_findings: T-FE-TOOL-001-01: Pure store test — verifies Zustand initializes activeTool as 'place'
T-FE-TOOL-001-02: Full App behavioral test — verifies aria-pressed='true' and bg-blue-600 on Place button at load
Tests use real Zustand store (no mocks) per established project pattern
data-testid='tool-place' and data-testid='tool-delete' required on ToolButton components
Active state requires both aria-pressed='true' AND bg-blue-600 CSS class

recommended_actions: Implement Toolbar.tsx — renders two ToolButton components (Place and Delete), reads activeTool from Zustand store
Implement ToolButton.tsx — data-testid='tool-{toolName}', aria-pressed, bg-blue-600 active class, calls setActiveTool on click
Verify Zustand store initializes activeTool as 'place' (default)
Run Toolbar.test.tsx and confirm T-FE-TOOL-001-01 and T-FE-TOOL-001-02 pass
Ensure GridPlane.tsx checks activeTool === 'place' before calling placeBrick
